name: io.github.kochava/kochava-for-advertisers-mcp-server
description: Kochava Analytics MCP Server. Query mobile attribution data, campaign performance, trackers, segments, and reports. Free App Analytics (FAA) account creation built-in — no Kochava account needed to get started.

environmentVariables.name: authentication-key
environmentVariables.description: Your Kochava API key. Leave empty to use FAA signup tools to create a free account and receive a key in-session.
